case_title: FITZGERALD, DARLENE VS JACKSON, JOHN C/O DISCOUNT BUILDERS et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,271.70 FILED BY FITZGERALD, DARLENE AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, JOHN C/O DISCOUNT BUILDERS "CHICO"  C/O DISCOUNT BUILDERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-10-1995 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
